title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 477.012 - Rule on jury instruction on child under age ten as a witness in criminal trial, duty of court
text:
477.012.  Rule on jury instruction on child under age ten as a witness in criminal trial, duty of court. — By January 1, 1991, the supreme court shall develop a jury instruction to be used in criminal trials wherein a child under the age of ten is a witness.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1370, et al. § 20)
